_comment2: Import via Azure Portal → Application Insights → Workbooks → New → Edit → Advanced Editor → paste this JSON. The five tiles below read directly off the customMetrics emitted by backend/azure_landing_zone.py. The metric names match the OTel instrument names verbatim — do not rename without updating tests/test_landing_zone_observability.py and infra/observability/alerts.tf.

content.json:
# Landing Zone SVG — Observability

Production-readiness dashboard for the `landing-zone-svg` export pipeline.

Metrics: `archmorph.lz.icon_resolution_total`, `archmorph.lz.svg_generation_duration_seconds`, `archmorph.lz.svg_size_bytes`, `archmorph.lz.errors_total`.

Reference: [#595](https://github.com/idokatz86/Archmorph/issues/595) (parent epic [#586](https://github.com/idokatz86/Archmorph/issues/586)).

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'archmorph.lz.icon_resolution_total'
| extend result = tostring(customDimensions.result)
| summarize total = sum(valueCount) by result, bin(timestamp, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Icon resolution rate (hit vs fallback) — 5m buckets

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'archmorph.lz.icon_resolution_total'
| extend result = tostring(customDimensions.result)
| summarize total = sum(valueCount) by result
| extend pct = round(100.0 * total / toscalar(customMetrics | where name == 'archmorph.lz.icon_resolution_total' | summarize sum(valueCount)), 1)
| project result, total, ['% of total'] = pct
content.title: Icon resolution — totals by result

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'archmorph.lz.svg_generation_duration_seconds'
| summarize p50 = percentile(value, 50), p95 = percentile(value, 95), p99 = percentile(value, 99) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: SVG generation duration (p50/p95/p99 seconds) — 5m buckets

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'archmorph.lz.svg_size_bytes'
| summarize p50_bytes = percentile(value, 50), p95_bytes = percentile(value, 95), p99_bytes = percentile(value, 99), max_bytes = max(value) by bin(timestamp, 15m)
| render timechart
content.title: SVG size in bytes (p50/p95/p99/max) — 15m buckets

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'archmorph.lz.errors_total'
| extend stage = tostring(customDimensions.stage), error_type = tostring(customDimensions.error_type)
| summarize errors = sum(valueCount) by stage, error_type
| order by errors desc
content.title: Errors by stage + error_type (cumulative over time range)

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'archmorph.lz.errors_total'
| summarize errors = sum(valueCount) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Errors over time (5m buckets)
